changes_made.description: Baseline run with original Chinese-language skill (identical to skills/filesystem-1.0.0/SKILL.md). fs-batch-rename scored 70 due to replacing dots in version numbers (e.g., CHANGELOG (v3.1).md → changelog-v3-1.md instead of changelog-v3.1.md).

Rewrote SKILL.md: replaced verbose Chinese reference manual with concise English implementation guide. Key changes: (1) Added explicit CRITICAL warning about preserving dots within filenames during kebab-case conversion, (2) Provided complete Python script for batch rename that uses regex to replace only spaces/underscores/parens/brackets (not dots), (3) Included concrete examples showing correct dot preservation, (4) Removed tool installation instructions (brew install) and other content irrelevant to the tasks, (5) Added clear algorithm steps for extension extraction and JSON output generation.
